headline: Block Governance Shifts Put Technology Oversight And Valuation In Focus
summary: New York State Common Retirement Fund has submitted a proposal for a board-level technology committee at Block (NYSE:XYZ), to be voted on at the upcoming annual meeting. The proposal seeks formal board oversight of technology, data, and related risks, reflecting growing investor focus on governance around core digital infrastructure. Block has also appointed Andrea Acosta as Chief Accounting Officer, bringing experience from other large tech sector companies and signaling an evolution in its...

headline: BofA revisits Block stock price target after earnings
summary: Block investors have been looking for signs that the company’s reset is doing more than lowering costs, and Bank of America says the first quarter gave them a stronger case to consider. headline: Truist Cuts PayPal Price Target as Cross-Border Volume Weakness Bites
summary: Shares of PayPal Holdings (NASDAQ:PYPL) picked up another cautious analyst signal on Tuesday, as Truist lowered its price target to $44 from $45 while maintaining a Sell rating. The price target cut is modest in size, but the continued Sell call carries weight in a market where consensus sits at Hold. For prudent investors, the ... Truist Cuts PayPal Price Target as Cross-Border Volume Weakness Bites

headline: Bhutan moves $8.2 million in BTC, signaling possible sale: Arkham
summary: The Royal Government of Bhutan transferred about 100.44 BTC worth $8.2 million on Tuesday, bringing 2026 outflows from Bhutan-labeled wallets past $230 million. Bhutan still holds roughly 3,119 BTC.
